studies.title: Efficacy of a cognitive-behavioral digital therapeutic on psychosocial outcomes in cancer patients: A randomized controlled trial

_verification.reason: The full text mentions a multizentrische randomisiert-kontrollierte Studie supported by the Bundes-Ministerium für Gesundheit, specifically investigating deprexis as an intervention for depressive patients. This directly links the study to the deprexis product.

_classification.reason: The study is explicitly described as a 'randomized controlled trial' in the title, indicating that participants were randomly allocated to intervention and control groups under controlled conditions.

studies.title: Internet-delivered cognitive behavioural therapy programme to reduce depressive symptoms in patients with multiple sclerosis: a multicentre, randomised, controlled, phase 3 trial

_verification.reason: The study specifically mentions 'deprexis' as an intervention being investigated for its effectiveness in treating depression in patients with multiple sclerosis. The full text confirms that deprexis is the product being studied, developed by GAIA AG.

_classification.reason: The study is described as a multicentre, randomised, controlled, phase 3 trial, which indicates that it is an interventional, experimental study with random allocation of participants to intervention and control groups under controlled conditions.
